intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1. Cluster the cells, then find the genes differentially expressed between the T-cell cluster and the monocyte cluster. Please use DESeq2 for the differential expression.

blocks.text: I'll help you cluster the cells and find differentially expressed genes between T cells and monocytes using DESeq2. Let me start by examining the data.
Good — the 10x matrix triplet is present. Now let me load and inspect it to get a summary before clustering.

input.code:
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from scipy.io import mmread
from scipy.sparse import csr_matrix
import gzip
import os

# Define paths
matrix_file = f'{DATA_DIR}/GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1.matrix.mtx.gz'
barcodes_file = f'{DATA_DIR}/GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1.barcodes.tsv.gz'
features_file = f'{DATA_DIR}/GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1.features.tsv.gz'

# Load the matrix
matrix = mmread(gzip.open(matrix_file, 'rb'))
matrix = csr_matrix(matrix.T)  # Transpose to get genes x cells

# Load barcodes (cell names)
barcodes = pd.read_csv(barcodes_file, sep='\t', header=None)[0].values

# Load features (gene names)
features = pd.read_csv(features_file, sep='\t', header=None)
gene_names = features[1].values  # Use the second column (gene symbol)

print(f"Matrix shape (genes x cells): {matrix.shape}")
print(f"Number of barcodes: {len(barcodes)}")
print(f"Number of features: {len(gene_names)}")
print(f"\nFirst few gene names: {gene_names[:10]}")
print(f"First few barcodes: {barcodes[:10]}")

# Create AnnData object
adata = sc.AnnData(X=matrix.T)  # Transpose back to cells x genes
adata.obs_names = barcodes
adata.var_names = gene_names

print(f"\nAnnData object shape: {adata.shape}")
print(f"Matrix type: {type(adata.X)}")
